creator: mc@hack.org
text:
dns/radns is marked as broken on FreeBSD 9.0. This is because
        a clash with type names in system include files.

Fix: 

New version available from author's site. Patch to port files
        included as attachment.


--=-=-=

Content-Disposition: attachment; filename=radns.patch
Content-Transfer-Encoding: base64
Content-Description: Patch to dns/radns port files.
